nasb.text: He sent letters to all the Jews, to the 127 provinces of the kingdom of Ahasuerus, namely, words of peace and truth,

esv.text: Letters were sent to all the Jews, to the 127 provinces of the kingdom of Ahasuerus, in words of peace and truth,

cnv.text: 他用和平和誠實的話，把文書送給亞哈隨魯國中一百二十七省所有的猶大人，

ccb.text: 用和善、真诚的话写信给亚哈随鲁王国一百二十七省的所有犹太人，
